changes.title: Module Status Live Badges
changes.description: Real-time badge counts on module tiles show pending items and cross-module alerts without leaving the launchpad.

changes.title: Release Notes & System Info
changes.description: Version history page and system info panel. Accessible from Settings → System or the user menu.

changes.title: Inventory Stock API
changes.description: New stock query and lot traceability endpoints expose inventory data for downstream consumers and BI tools.

changes.title: Report Endpoints
changes.description: Production, downtime, and quality report APIs now available for export and external BI integration.

changes.title: Work Order Auto-Rules
changes.description: Configure rules that automatically advance work orders based on job completion criteria.

changes.title: Engineering Change Orders (ECO)
changes.description: Full ECO workflow with BOM revision control, impact analysis, and multi-version side-by-side comparison.

changes.title: OrgUnit Sync Validation
changes.description: Fixed ValidationResult unwrapping in OrgUnits sync endpoint returning incorrect error shape to callers.

changes.title: BOM Versioning
changes.description: Side-by-side BOM comparison and multi-level exploded view with indentation and quantity rollup.

changes.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
changes.description: TOTP and passkey (WebAuthn) MFA with per-account setup flow and optional enforcement by role.

changes.title: Audit Log
changes.description: Comprehensive audit trail for all data modifications, accessible to administrators with filter and export.

changes.title: Dual Auth — JWT + Cookie
changes.description: API clients use Bearer JWT while the web frontend uses HttpOnly cookies transparently for security.

changes.title: Initial Release
changes.description: AeroMes MES platform — production, quality, master data, integration, and reporting modules.
